title: Syncing Timeline with Start and End Date Columns
excerpt:
I would like my timeline to automatically update when the start and end dates of the same item change. It looks like this should be a dependency, but it does not seem to be working.

posts.author: rwolkoff (Rebecca Wolkoff)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like my timeline to automatically update when the start and end dates of the same item change. It looks like this should be a dependency, but it does not seem to be working.

I have the dependency set to “Adjust Timeline to reflect the changes made in Date of the same item.” I’m new to monday so maybe I’m doing something silly here. Any input would be welcome!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rwolkoff

Welcome to the community. There is an app in the marketplace that does do exactly that. It can be found at https://monday.com/marketplace/18
